package_manager_evidence: No package.json/go.mod/Gemfile/requirements.txt/Cargo.toml found at repo root (confirmed by directory listing). System package installs inside scripts use apt (scripts/core-tools/install.sh:9-20) but that manages the OS, not this repo.
ci_evidence: .github/ does not exist in this repo (confirmed: find .github -> not found).

apply_gnome_settings.note: Several lines use sudo (t480s/t480s-settings.sh:57-58 for battery thresholds via /sys/class/power_supply/BAT0/); not idempotent-safe to re-run blindly on a different machine model.

install_all.note: Orchestrates all per-app install.sh: calls scripts/core-tools/install.sh, then applications/*/install.sh, then wires GNOME extensions and symlinks for fep-switcher, app-switch-us-input, tmux-switch-us-input.

install_packages_and_tools.note: Installs apt packages and tools (mise, gh, ghq, Claude Code, Codex CLI) via curl/wget pipelines; requires sudo and network access. App-specific packages (keyd, mpv, ffmpeg, yt-dlp, espanso, google-chrome) are installed by each applications/*/install.sh.

toggle_gnome_overview.note: Designed to be invoked via a keyboard shortcut, not run directly by a human. install.sh (in gnome-extensions/gnome-overview-toggle/) symlinks this to ~/.local/bin/gnome-overview-toggle and registers a GNOME custom keybinding.

install_battery_alert.note: Symlinks battery_alert.py and battery-alert.service into ~/.local/bin and ~/.config/systemd/user, and renders battery-alert.timer from .env's POLL_INTERVAL. No sudo required. Re-run after editing .env to refresh the generated timer.
